heading: Notification of post-employment restrictions for Senators and employees
label: 4728 Notification of post-employment restrictions for Senators and employees
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 104f of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: After a Senator or an elected officer of the Senate leaves office or after the termination of employment with the Senate of an employee of the Senate, the Secretary of the Senate shall notify the Member, officer, or employee of the beginning and ending date of the prohibitions that apply to the Member, officer, or employee under rule XXXVII of the Standing Rules of the Senate.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: b Effective date
children.text: This section shall take effect 60 days after .September 14, 2007
